texto: Empathy is a big part of Sparkleponies, because it’s also my belief (as a history and political science major) that societies that don’t practice rational empathy inevitably collapse – either by fomenting conflict from within by oppressing a segment/s of their populace, or seeking conflict from without by taking from others and eventually getting into a fight they can’t win.
explicacao: Citação de Chris Kluwe sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Empathy is a big part of Sparkleponies, because it’s also my belief (as a history and political s…” articula sucesso, civilization, conflict em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como conflict e empathy.
